description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the php:7.3 Docker image with a global before_script that runs apt-get update, installs git and zip, enables PHP extensions curl, json, zip, mbstring, gd and pdo_mysql, installs Composer via the official installer, adds php-parallel-lint and php-cs-fixer as dev dependencies, and runs composer install. Cache the vendor/ directory. Add a job_lint_app_phpnextversion in the test stage that overrides the image to php:7.4, is allowed to fail, and executes ./vendor/bin/parallel-lint --exclude vendor . followed by ./vendor/bin/php-cs-fixer -vvv fix . --dry-run --diff --using-cache=no --rules=@PSR2. Add test_app_php56, test_app_php70, test_app_php71, and test_app_php72 jobs in the test stage with images php:5.6, php:7.0, php:7.1, and php:7.2 respectively, each running the same parallel-lint and php-cs-fixer commands. Finally, add test_app_phpdefaultversion in the test stage using the default php:7.3 image and running the same two commands.
